shorts.title: Hospital fire underscores region's health care capacity challenges
shorts.title_distilled: Hospital fire underscores region's health care capacity challenges.
shorts.description: The fire that shut Lehigh Valley Hospital-Dickson City reignited anxieties about health care capacity challenges, just days after a deal that saved Commonwealth Health’s Scranton hospitals.

shorts.title: Fire at Pennsylvania Hospital Forces Evacuation of Dozens of Patients
shorts.title_distilled: Fire at Pennsylvania Hospital Forces Evacuation of Dozens of Patients.
shorts.description: A fire tore through a northeastern Pennsylvania hospital, sending smoke billowing into the air as dozens of patients were evacuated and emergency medical crews were rushed in from across the region, authorities said. No one was reported injured by the …

shorts.title: Pittston St. Patrick’s Parade marches on Saturday despite race cancellation
shorts.description: The first big NEPA St. Patrick's parade of the year is Saturday in Pittston. The traditional parade day race was canceled over the objections of parade organizers.
shorts.content: The first big NEPA St. Patrick's parade of the year is Saturday in Pittston. The traditional parade day race was canceled over the objections of parade organizers.

shorts.title: NAMI Northeast PA talks with walking club participants in Scranton
shorts.title_distilled: NAMI Northeast PA talks with walking club participants in Scranton.
shorts.description: NAMI Northeast Region PA staff and volunteers recently visited the Connell Park Walking Club hosted by Valley in Motion. The club, which often hosts guest speakers who share health and wellness information before the group walk through the park, welcomed NAMI representatives, from left, Ray Hayes, Mike Joyce and Amy Morgan. They spoke about NAMI’s advocacy, educational programs, training and local monthly support groups. For information on NAMI’s mental health resources, visit NAMINEPA.org or email info@naminepa.org to schedule a talk at your organization.
shorts.content: NAMI Northeast Region PA staff and volunteers recently visited the Connell Park Walking Club hosted by Valley in Motion. The club, which often hosts guest speakers who share health and wellness information before the group walk through the park, welcomed NAMI representatives, from left, Ray Hayes, Mike Joyce and Amy Morgan. They spoke about NAMI’s advocacy, educational programs, training and local monthly support groups. For information on NAMI’s mental health resources, visit NAMINEPA.org or email info@naminepa.org to schedule a talk at your organization.

shorts.title: BOYS BASKETBALL: 2025-26 Lackawanna League Coaches Division II All-Star Team
shorts.title_distilled: BOYS BASKETBALL: 2025-26 Lackawanna League Coaches Division II All-Star Team.
shorts.description: 2025-26 LACKAWANNA LEAGUE BOYS’ COACHES ALL-STARS DIVISION II Player of the Year: Nico Antoniacci, Riverside First team Nico Antoniacci, Riverside Brayden Rose, Riverside Brayden Canavan, Dunmore Cameron Parker, Old Forge Logan Fanning, Old Forge CJ Thompson, Holy Cross Honorable mention: Adam Badyrka, Holy Cross; Carter Sload, Dunmore; Landon Pratt, Mid Valley; Chase Rosenkrans, Lakeland; Nate Aviles, Dunmore; Jimmy Clark, Dunmore.     All-Defensive team Player of the Year: Logan Fanning, Old Forge Logan Fanning, Old Forge Michael Schimelfenig, Riverside Nate Aviles, Dunmore Brayden Rose, Riverside Ryan DeMarco, Old Forge CJ Thompson, Holy Cross

shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Energy is building for one of the biggest days of the year in Scranton. shorts.title: Local professor weighs in on Middle East conflict
shorts.title_distilled: Local professor weighs in on Middle East conflict.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — In the days after joint strikes by the United States and Israel on Iran, many people are still searching for answers. Attention is now turning to what comes next and how this conflict could unfold. 28/22 News Reporter Colby Hughes sought insight from a local political science professor on where [...]
